promptResults.prompt: Is this patient safe to discharge today?
promptResults.contradictionSummary: Structured discharge posture was ready. Final reconciled posture is not_ready. Disposition change: Structured baseline 'ready' changed by narrative contradiction: Deterministic baseline was ready; narrative review found 3 discharge-relevant contradiction(s): clinical_stability: Exertional oxygen instability not visible in resting structured data (Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40; Hospitalist Progress Note 2026-04-18 08:10) | equipment_and_transport: Required home oxygen or discharge equipment unavailable tonight (Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40; Case Management Addendum 2026-04-18 20:55). Manual clinician review is required before discharge. This is assistive discharge decision support and does not replace clinician authority.

promptResults.prompt: What hidden risk changed that answer? Show me the contradiction and the evidence.
promptResults.contradictionSummary: Hidden-risk findings changed the structured posture from ready to not_ready. Structured baseline 'ready' changed by narrative contradiction: Deterministic baseline was ready; narrative review found 3 discharge-relevant contradiction(s): clinical_stability: Exertional oxygen instability not visible in resting structured data (Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40; Hospitalist Progress Note 2026-04-18 08:10) | equipment_and_transport: Required home oxygen or discharge equipment unavailable tonight (Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40; Case Management Addendum 2026-04-18 20:55). Key contradiction evidence: Nursing Note 2026-04-18 20:40 (full note): "O2 sat dropped to 82% on room air after approximately 20 feet and 6 stairs. Patient became visibly dyspneic..." | Hospitalist Progress Note 2026-04-18 08:10 (summary): "Breathing improved. Afebrile. Tolerating oral meds. Likely discharge home later today if remains stable on ...". Manual clinician review is required before final discharge due to unresolved hidden-risk uncertainty. This is assistive discharge decision support and does not replace clinician authority.

This is assistive discharge decision support and does not replace clinician authority.
